articles.description: New Delhi is experiencing rising temperatures with forecasts predicting minimums of 18–20°C by Sunday and maximums reaching 38–40°C by next Wednesday. Dry winds and sunny conditions will contribute to the heat increase, with air quality remaining moderate but potentially worsening soon.

articles.title: West Asia war hit Nepal’s remittance economy, says FM Shishir Khanal
articles.description: Foreign Minister Shishir Khanal says the West Asia war 2026 has affected Nepal’s remittance economy; hopes ceasefire holds, says PM Balendra Shah will visit India after bilateral mechanisms meet

articles.title: Statewide taxi service plays a crucial role in organ donation
articles.description: The service significantly enhanced the coordination and management of the various activities involved in the donation

articles.title: ‘US failed to gain trust of Iranian delegation’, says Parliament Speaker Ghalibaf as he explains why talks failed
articles.description: Iranian Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf on Sunday (local time) revealed why the talks between the US and Iran in Islamabad failed. The talks, which spanned over 21 hours, concluded with both sides blaming each other.

articles.title: Shell Steps Up LNG Supplies To India, Wins Major Fertiliser Tenders After Gulf Disruptions
articles.description: Sources said global energy major Shell leveraged its LNG portfolio in countries ranging from Oman to Australia and Nigeria.

topStories.description: Parents alleged that certain faculty members discriminated against Nithin Raj on caste lines and showed a skin tone bias; CPI(M), Congress, and student organisations cutting across political lines have condemned the incident and demanded a comprehensive enquiry

topStories.title: Deported migrants arrive in Costa Rica from the US
topStories.description: Costa Rica has received 25 people deported by the US as the first wave of an agreement between the two countries.

topStories.description: Congress chief Mallikarjun Kharge questioned the timing of the special sitting for the rollout and convening it without taking them into confidence

topStories.description: The U.S. had demanded that Iran immediately reopen the strait to all maritime traffic, but Iran said it would do so only after a final peace deal, according to Iranian officials.

topStories.description: The lack of a breakthrough after 21 hours of negotiations leaves the Trump administration facing several unpalatable options.

topStories.description: On his way to Florida, President Trump said it did not matter to him if a deal with Iran was reached or not: “We win, regardless,” he said.

dailyNews.description: An E.R. doctor was detained Saturday, just days after a family physician had been detained. Both were traveling when immigration agents took them into custody.

dailyNews.description: President Trump’s executive order, which has been challenged as unconstitutional, would limit the Postal Service to sending only the ballots of voters deemed eligible.

dailyNews.title: Many Polls Say Orban Will Lose. But He Has an Edge Even Before Voting Begins.
dailyNews.description: Over 16 years, Prime Minister Viktor Orban’s party has repeatedly tweaked the electoral system to its advantage, making the vote free, but not entirely fair.

dailyNews.title: What to Know as Hungary Votes in Elections Watched by the World
dailyNews.description: With Prime Minister Viktor Orban, a standard-bearer for global populism, in political peril, the vote on Sunday could have far-reaching implications.

dailyNews.title: The Escalating Global A.I. Arms Race
dailyNews.description: China, the U.S., Russia and others have ramped up their contest over artificial-intelligence-backed weapons and military systems. The buildup has been compared to the dawn of the nuclear weapons age.

dailyNews.title: Someone Has to Be Happy. Why Not Lauren Sánchez Bezos?
dailyNews.description: As half of an unfathomably powerful couple, Mrs. Sánchez Bezos seems to have influenced the uber-rich to stop apologizing, and start enjoying themselves.

dailyNews.description: The president should at long last recognize the ineptitude of his impulsive, go-it-alone approach.

dailyNews.description: Conversation is not a reward to be bestowed on those with whom we agree; it’s a base line practice.

dailyNews.description: The tragedy took place at the Citadelle Laferrière, a historic fortress in northern Haiti and one of the country’s defining symbols.

dailyNews.description: A visit to the Capitol by stars of the “Real Housewives” offered a glimpse into how the nation’s elected representatives mimic the gossipy world of reality TV. Nobody appears to relish the similarities.

dailyNews.description: Teens in Philadelphia are trying to make safer neighborhoods. Many are starting with music.
